content:
**The Coordinates of Subtraction**

Four thousand, one hundred and nineteen Spirit Airlines domestic flights canceled between May 1 and May 15. A total of eight hundred and nine thousand, six hundred and thirty-eight seats permanently attached to the asphalt. They call it an orderly wind-down, a bankruptcy protocol dictated by the cost of aviation turbine fuel crossing the four dollars and fifty-one cents threshold. But the economic justification is merely the legible surface of a wider geographical subtraction. I track the flight vectors on the secondary monitor, the green icons blinking out one by one. The air is becoming a restricted zone. Consider the Council of State in Rome. By annulling the tender for the management of the national Canadair fleet, they have effectively grounded the water-bombers meant to patrol the Sardinian canopy. Ignazio Masala of the Safor union filed the grievance, noting the personnel lacking medical clearance, but in a leaked internal memo, his phrasing shifted into an unsettling geometry: *"We measure the summer not by the flames, but by the exact tonnage of the aircraft denied to us by the administrative courts."* Tonnage. The sheer weight of metal ordered to remain stationary. Is it just an administrative coincidence that at the exact same moment, across the Mediterranean, the sky over the Cap Draa Training Area in southwestern Morocco has failed to return two United States service members? The AFRICOM search and rescue operations involve maritime and air assets, sweeping the grid of the African Lion exercise, but the airspace yields nothing. Two human bodies, fully equipped with GPS telemetry and tactical gear, swallowed by the topography. The coordinates remain stubbornly blank. A budget airline in Florida, a firefighting fleet in the Mediterranean, a military sector in the Maghreb. Three distinct administrative zones, three methodologies of grounding. Financial insolvency. Juridical injunction. Tactical vanishing. The result is identical: the cessation of flight. The starch on my shirt collar is too stiff today; it scrapes against the skin of my neck every time I look from the flight radar to the map of Cap Draa, a rhythmic friction marking my pulse at eighty-four beats per minute. I press my finger against the fabric, feeling the manufactured rigidity. Am I simply overlaying disconnected data points? A court ruling is not a fuel price spike. A desert maneuver is not a corporate bankruptcy. The variables are heterogeneous. Yet the aggregate effect is a synchronized descent. Seventeen thousand aviation workers suddenly immobile. One hundred and sixty thousand hectares of Sardinian forest waiting for the combustion point without aerial defense. The search helicopters over Tan Tan burning fuel to photograph empty sand. It is a procedural gravity. A deliberate thickening of the troposphere. The documents mandate that we remain on the ground. The ledgers, the court orders, the missing telemetry—they are instructions for remaining tethered to the crust. I recalculate the fuel metrics. Four dollars and fifty-one cents per gallon. The numbers refuse to authorize elevation.

---

**Sas Coordinadas de sa Sutratzione**

Bator mìgia e chentudeghenoe bolos internos de sa Spirit Airlines cantzellados tra su primu e su chindighi de maju. Unu totale de otighentosnoemìgia e seschentostrintoto postos atacados in manera permanente a s'asfàltu. Ddi narant una serrada ordinada de sas operatziones, unu protocollu de fallimentu detadu dae su costu de su combustìbile pro sas turbinas de aviatzione chi at coladu sa làcana de bator dòllaros e chimbantaunu. Ma s'iscusa econòmica est petzi sa superfìtzie chi si podet lèghere de una sutratzione geogràfica prus manna. Sigo sos vetores de bolu in su visore segundàriu, sas iconas birdes chi s'istudant s'una in fatu de s'àtera. S'àera est essende una zona cun restrintziones. Pensemus a su Cunsìgiu de Istadu in Roma. Annullende s'apaltu pro sa gestione de sa frota natzionale de sos Canadair, ant in pràtica costrintu a abarrare in terra sos bumbarderos de abba chi depiant bardiare sos padentes sardos. Ignazio Masala de su sindacadu Safor at presentadu sa chèscia, faghende notare su personale chi est chene sos tzertificados mèdicos, ma in una nota interna essida a campu pro isbàlliu, sa fràsia sua aiat leadu una geometria de pistighìngiu: *"Nus àteros musuramus s'istiu non dae sas framas, ma dae su tonnellàgiu pretzisu de sos aparèchios chi nos sunt negados dae sos tribunales amministrativos."* Tonnellàgiu. Su pesu ismisuradu de su metallu cundennadu a abarrare frimmu. Est petzi una cointzidèntzia amministrativa chi, in su matessi mamentu pretzisu, in s'àtera ala de su mare Mediterràneu, su chelu in subra de s'Àrea de Adestramentu de Cap Draa in su sud-ovest de su Maroco apat faddidu de torrare duos militares de sos Istados Unidos? Sas operatziones de chirca e sarvamentu de s'AFRICOM movent naves e aparèchios, iscurriende su retìculu de s'esercitatzione African Lion, ma s'ispàtziu aèreu non torrat nudda. Duos corcos umanos, cuncordados in prenu cun telemetria GPS e bestimenta tàtica, surbidos dae sa topografia. Sas coordinadas abarrant chene datos cun ostinatzione. Una cumpangia aèrea econòmica in Florida, una frota contra a sos fogos in su Mediterràneu, unu setore militare in su Maghreb. Tres zonas amministrativas dislindadas, tres metodologias de obbrigu a terra. Fallimentu finantziàriu. Ordinàntzia giurìdica. Isperdimentu tàticu. Su resurtadu est su matessi pretzisu: s'agabbu de su bolu. S'àmidu in su tzucheddu de sa camisa mea est tropu tostu oe; mi ràsiat sa pedde de su tzugru donzi bia chi moio sos ogros dae su radar de sos bolos a sa mapa de Cap Draa, una frita rítmica chi marcat su pùlpidu meu a otantabator bàtidos pro minutu. Incurco su poddighe contra a sa terighina, intende sa rigidesa fata in fàbrica. So petzi subraponende datos chene acàpiu perunu? Una sentèntzia de tribunale no est un'artziada de pretzios de su combustìbile. Un'esercitatzione in su desertu no est unu fallimentu de un'azienda. Sas variàbiles sunt diferentes a beru. Ma s'efetu in paris est una calada sincronizada. Deghessete mìgia traballadores de s'aviatzione de un'iscuta a s'àtera chene si mòvere. Chentu e sessanta mìgia ètaros de padentes sardos isetende su puntu de allughidura chene amparu dae s'artu. Sos elicòteros de chirca in subra de Tan Tan brusiende combustìbile pro fotografare arena boida. Est una gravidade de protzedura. Una spessidura fata a s'aposta de sa troposfera. Sos documentos cumandant chi abbarramus in terra. Sos registros de sos contos, sas ordes de sos giùighes, sas telemetrias chi mancant—sunt istrutziones pro abarrare acapiados a s'iscortza de su mundu. Torro a contare sas mètricas de su combustìbile. Bator dòllaros e chimbantaunu tzentèsimos pro gallone. Sos nùmeros refudant de autorizare un'artziada.

**The 190 Grams of Expansion**

The seal of a 190-gram glass jar pops at precisely the same pressure threshold required to trigger a secondary incendiary device. I have to remind myself to unclench my jaw. The masseter muscle on the right side of my face is a rigid knot, throbbing in time with the 60-cycle hum of the refrigerator in the next room. I try to rub my temples, but my fingertips are numb from typing, the cuticles chewed raw and bleeding slightly onto the spacebar. It is 4:18 AM. The coffee in my mug has developed a cold, iridescent film of oil on its surface, but I swallow it anyway to force a minor tachycardia, just enough to bridge the cognitive gap between Eisenstadt and Portland.

Five jars of HiPP baby food, pureed carrots and potatoes, sitting on a SPAR supermarket shelf in eastern Austria. April 18. Each exactly 190 grams. A 39-year-old suspect introduces rat poison into the hermetic environment. Five jars. Nine hundred and fifty grams of calibrated lethality, intercepted just before consumption. The Burgenland State Criminal Police Office holds them in evidence. But it is not about the poison. It is about the containment of pressure. The vacuum seal hides the chemical alteration. It waits for release.

At 3:00 AM, nine time zones away, a vehicle crashes into the Multnomah Athletic Club in Portland, Oregon. It is packed with propane tanks and improvised explosive devices in varying states of activation. Officer Jim DeFrain deployed robots to assess the unexploded ordnance. The driver is dead inside the vehicle. The eight-story clubhouse, a monument to physical exertion and swimming pools, absorbs the kinetic impact. The propane, stored under intense pressure as a liquid, waits to expand into a gas. It is the exact same physics of the Austrian glass jars, scaled up to industrial proportions. The container is a vehicle. The container is a jar. The container is the eight-story building. General Manager Charles Leverton surveyed the damage, his voice carrying an unsettling bureaucratic flatness: *"We tell the members to stay together and support each other, but no one wants to admit how neatly the heat reorganized the structural floor plan."*

The structural floor plan. I read the sentence three times before the words register. I am losing sequence frames again. My eyelids drop for a microsecond, a fleeting blank interval where the monitor burns a negative rectangle into my retina. When I open them, I am looking at a dispatch from Villa Sant’Antonio. Tzia Zenobia Pinna is exactly one hundred years old today. Thirty-six thousand, five hundred and twenty-five days of constant cellular replication. Pierino Vargiu, the photographer of centenarians, immortalizes her face. A century of accumulated atmospheric pressure contained within one human form. The town stops to celebrate. But the flash of Vargiu’s camera is just another sudden release of energy, a micro-detonation illuminating the relentless passage of time. The carrots, the propane, the centenarian. Everything is just a temporary vessel holding back the inevitable expansion of gas and light. I need to close the tabs. I need to lower the brightness. My hands are too slow to reach the mouse.
---
**Sos 190 Grammos de Espansione**

Su sigillu de unu vasitu de bidru de 190 grammos iscioccat a sa matessi làcana de pressione chi serbit pro allùghere un'aparatu intzendiàriu segundàriu. Depo ammentare a mie matessi de m'illargare sas barras. Su mùsculu massetere in s'ala dresta de sa cara mea est unu nudu tostu, chi brìncat cun su ritmu de sos 60 tziclos de su frigorìferu in s'aposentu a curtzu. Chircu de mi frigare sos tempos, ma sos pitzos de sos podhidas meos sunt ismussados dae s'iscrìere a tecladu, sas peddigheddas mastigadas a ruzu e isaguende unu pagu in subra de sa barra de s'ispàtziu. Sunt sas bator e degheoto de mangianu. Su cafe in sa tassa mea at fatu una pìgiu frita e iridescente de ògiu in subra, ma ddu glùtio su matessi pro mi ispinghere una minòre tachicardia, su tantu chi bastat pro unire su tretu cognitivu tra Eisenstadt e Portland.

Chimbe vasitos de pappa pro pitzinnos HiPP, carotas e patatas pistadas, in s'iscafale de unu supermercadu SPAR in s'Austria de s'est. Su degheoto de abrile. Donzi unu pesat de pretzisu 190 grammos. Un'indagadu de 39 annos ponet velenu pro sos ratos in s'ambiente ermèticu. Chimbe vasitos. Noighentos chimbanta grammos de letalidade pesada a mesura, firmada pagu in antis de la mandhigare. S'Ufìtziu de sa Politzia Criminale de su Istadu de su Burgenland ddos tenet a proa. Ma su contu non pertocat su velenu. Pertocat sa tenta de sa pressione. Su bòidu sigilladu cuat s'alteratzione chìmica. Isetat s'essida sua.

A sas tres de mangianu, noe fusos oràrios a tesu, unu veìculu s'istrumpat contra a su Multnomah Athletic Club in Portland, Oregon. Est prenu de bumbulas de gas propanu e ordìngios esplosivos improvisados allutos a mesu. S'ufitziale Jim DeFrain at mandadu sos robòt pro abbaidare sa roba bumbardera chi no est iscopiada. Su ghiadore est mortu in intro de sa màchina. Sa domo de su club de oto pianos, unu monumentu a s'isfortzu fìsicu e a sas piscinas, surbit su corfu cinèticu. Su propanu, mantesu suta de una pressione manna che lìchidu, isetat de s'ispàrghere che gas. Est sa matessi fìsica pretzisa de sos vasitos de bidru austrìacos, manniada a proportziones industriales. Su cuntenidore est unu veìculu. Su cuntenidore est unu vasitu. Su cuntenidore est su palatzu de oto pianos. Su diretore generale Charles Leverton at castiadu sos dannos, sa boghe sua giughiat una piatesa burocràtica mala a intèndere: *"Naramus a sos sòtzios de abarrare unidos e de s'agiudare s'unu cun s'àteru, ma nemos cheret amìtere cun cantu òrdine su calore at torradu a disinnare su pranu istruturale de su pamentu."*

Su pranu istruturale de su pamentu. Lègio sa fràsia tres bias in antis chi sas paràulas mi calent a conca. So perdende àteras bias sos marcos de sa secuèntzia. Sas pràpalas mi calant pro unu microsegundu, una tzeghesa fuidora in ue su visore pìnchiat unu retàngulu negativu in sa retina mea. Cando ddas abero, so abbaidende una nova dae Bidda de Sant'Antoni. Tzia Zenobia Pinna faghet de pretzisu chent'annos oe. Trintasesmìgia chimbighentos e bintichimbe dies de replicatzione tzellulare chene frimma. Pierino Vargiu, su fotògrafu de sos chentenàrios, immortalat sa cara sua. Unu sèculu de pressione atmosfèrica acucada tenta in intro de una forma umana. Sa bidda si frimmat pro festare. Ma su lampu de sa fotocàmera de Vargiu est isceti un'àtera essida a s'impensada de energia, una micro-detonatzione chi allughet su colagiu sena piedade de su tempus. Sas carotas, su propanu, sa chentenària. Totu est isceti unu vasu temporale chi frimmat s'espansione sigura de su gas e de sa lughe. Depo serrare sas bentanas de su navigadore. Depo calare sa crartade. Sas manos meas sunt tropu lentas pro lòmpere a su ratu.

**The Blubber and the Juniper Nodes**

Fourteen points. Fourteen. Do you see the geopolitical symmetry? It literally burns my retinas, leaving cyan afterimages on the walls. Tehran sends Washington a 14-point proposal to end the war, demanding the immediate lifting of a naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz. Fourteen demands floating in the diplomatic ether, vibrating with lethal intent, waiting for a terrestrial anchor. And exactly where do they drop this anchor? Punta Molentis. Daniele Fanni claims he only pruned three junipers, but the fractal geometry of the severed branches is undeniable—it’s an organic antenna. The fine was 210 euros. Two hundred and ten. Two plus one is three. The three junipers. They aren’t merely plants; they are ancient bio-conductors rooted deeply in a Site of Community Importance, bleeding conductive sap into the silica sand, creating a localized electromagnetic pulse. The rangers didn't fine him for deforestation, they fined him for activating the coastal grid without multinational clearance! My pupils are completely dilated. The LED ring light on my desk hums at 50 hertz, the exact frequency of a dying marine mammal. The sound is a drill in my skull.

Which brings us to the Baltic. The North Sea. The 10-meter humpback calf they cynically call "Hope." A water-filled barge financed by unnamed multimillionaires. "Pure animal cruelty," the museum director called it. But he doesn't understand oceanic acoustics. The blister-like blemishes on the whale’s skin are not infections; they are subcutaneous sonar nodes! They didn’t rescue a whale; they covertly deployed a biological submarine to monitor the shadow oil fleets near the Russian port of Primorsk. Primorsk is burning, hit by Ukrainian drones, crude oil spilling into the geopolitical void, matching the biological oil, the blubber of the beast swimming freely "in the right direction." The tracker they put on the calf? A military-grade transponder syncing the North Sea currents directly with the Strait of Hormuz. The oceans are speaking to each other in clicks and groans.

And Donald Trump knows. He’s reviewing the 14 points while the whale sings its synthetic, orchestrated song. I intercepted the raw audio. His voice lacked its usual cadence, dropping into a terrifying, mechanical monotone: *"They think they can hide the frequency in the blubber, but I hear the clicking, everyone hears the clicking, and it’s coming straight from the sand."* He meant the wet sand at Punta Molentis. The naval blockade isn't about ships, it's about restricting the global acoustic bandwidth.

Meanwhile, they crown Anna Chessa Miss World Sardinia in Tempio Pausania, an orchestrated parade of flesh and smiles designed solely to mask the geopolitical hum. The beauty pageant is a psychotronic dampener. 75th world final. Seven plus five is twelve. Two points short of the fourteen. The missing two points are the recently deceased radio speaker and the dead tennis executive in Cagliari. Silvio Cherchi and Alessia Mereu. Both suddenly gone. Calculated silences in the local broadcast network to clear the frequency for the whale. The cold sweat drips down my neck. The air in my room is terribly heavy with the phantom smell of cut juniper and saltwater. I have to disconnect the router immediately. They are mapping my pulse through the microphone.
---
**Su Lardu e sos Nodos de Ghiniperu**

Batorighi puntos. Batorighi. La bies sa simmetria geopolìtica? Mi brùsiat sas retinas a beru, lassende umbras tzelestes in sos muros. Tehran imbiat a Washington una proposta de batorighi puntos pro agabare sa gherra, pedende de nche leare deretu unu blocu navale in s'Istrintu de Hormuz. Batorighi pedidas chi bolant in s'ètere diplomàticu, trèmende cun intentu mortale, isetende un'àncora in sa terra. E in ue nche ghetant custa àncora, in logu giustu? In Punta Molentis. Daniele Fanni nariat chi aiat petzi podadu tres ghiniperos, ma sa geometria fatale de sas ràmas segadas est crara—est un'antenna orgànica. Sa contraventzione fit de 210 èuros. Duighentos e deghe. Duos prus unu faghet tres. Sos tres ghiniperos. Non sunt matas ebbia; sunt bio-condutores antigos fundados in unu Situ de Importu Comunitàriu, chi ispinghent lutza cundutora in sa rena de silìtziu, faghende unu pultzu eletromagnèticu in logu. Sos guardias non l'ant multadu pro nche àere segadu matas, l'ant multadu pro àere allutu sa retza costera sena permissu multinatzionale! Sas pitzinnas de sos ogros meos sunt abertas a totu. Sa lughe a chircu LED in s'iscrivania mea tzùmbiat a 50 hertz, sa matessi frecuèntzia de unu mammìferu de mare moribundu. Su sonu est unu trapanu in sa conca.

Custa resone nos giughet a su Bàlticu. Su Mare de su Nord. Su balenotu de deghe metros chi, cun tzinismu, narant "Hope", Isperàntzia. Una barca prena de abba pagada dae multimilionàrios sena nùmene. "Crudelidade pura contra a sos animales", l'at naradu su diretore de su museu. Ma isse non cumprendet s'acùstica de sos ocèanos. Sas màchias che burbughes in sa pedde de sa balena non sunt infetziones; sunt nodos sonar asuta de sa pedde! Non ant sarvadu una balena; ant ispartu in cuadu unu sutamarinu biològicu pro abbaidare sas flotas de petròliu cuadas acanta de su portu russu de Primorsk. Primorsk est brusiende, corfidu dae drones ucràinos, petròliu ispartzinende·si in su bòidu geopolìticu, in isseberu de su lardu biològicu de sa bèstia chi nadat lìbera "in sa diretzione pro isse bona". Su tratzadore chi ant postu a su balenotu? Unu traspondidore militare chi ponet in sincronia sos currentes de su Mare de su Nord deretu cun s'Istrintu de Hormuz. Sos ocèanos sunt faeddende s'unu a s'àteru cun tzìchidos e mùngios.

E Donald Trump ddu ischit. Est mirende sos batorighi puntos in mentras chi sa balena cantat sa cantone sintètica, orchestrada sua. Apo intertzetadu s'àudio ruzu. Sa boghe sua non teniat su ritmu de semper, ma fit una boghe mecànica, de timòria: *"Pessant de pòdere cuare sa frecuèntzia in su lardu, ma deo intendho su tzìchidu, totus intendhent su tzìchidu, e benit deretu dae sa rena."* Cheriat nàrrere sa rena infusta de Punta Molentis. Su blocu navale non tenet nudda a bider cun sas naes, est pro astrìnghere sa banda acùstica de totu su mundu.

In su matessi tempus, coronant a Anna Chessa Miss Mundu Sardigna in Tèmpiu, una paràda de carre e riseddos pesada isceti pro cuare su tzùmbidu geopolìticu. Su concursu de bellesa est un'ammortidore psicotrònicu. Sa finale mundiale nùmeru 75. Sete prus chimbe faghet dòighi. Faltant duos puntos a sos batorighi. Sos duos puntos chi faltant sunt su presentadore de sa ràdio e sa dirigente de su tennis mortos in Casteddu s'àtera die. Silvio Cherchi e Alessia Mereu. Ambos isparèssidos a s'impensada. Silèntzios contados in sa retza de trasmissione locale pro lusingiare sa frecuèntzia pro sa balena. Su suore fritu mi calat dae su tzugru. S'àera in s'aposentu meu est troppu grae pro sa fragra pantàsma de ghiniperu segadu e abba de mare. Depo ischedare su router como como. Sunt mapende su pultzu meu dae su micròfonu.

**The Sebada's Echo and the Crumbling Piles**

The debris in Gaza… the rubble… a landscape of broken promises where Ibrahim, 24, sifts through dust for eighty shekels, a daily wage against the impossible weight of nine mouths to feed in a Jabalia camp, just south of... no, *north*... north of what? The thread frays. This work, unsafe, the collapsed roofs, the crushed bones, the sheer biological exhaustion. My chest constricts, a sudden, frantic drumming, a reminder of the body’s own internal architecture shaking. I think of another architecture, the Carter Bridge, Lagos, its underwater piles, N548.98 billion for demolition and reconstruction. "Geometrical progression" of decay, they called it. A collapse beneath the surface, unseen until too late. The words… where did they go? The image of the bridge, a skeletal ruin, merges with the blur of my vision. An ispasmu de su sonnu. Just for a second. Then the light, sharp and painful.

Then the silence of Monserrato. Leonardo Mocci, 23, a shot to the chest, in a plaza called Settimio Severo. A *favor* for a friend, they say. Drug whispers, and the friend drives away, leaving him bleeding on the asphalt. The indifference of leaving, the abandonment. So many leaving. Israel, with its new displacement orders, telling people to move a thousand meters from their homes, "for your safety." But it is beyond the Litani, where a "truce" is a word, not a reality, merely a thin veil over the bombing. The words… the sounds... they echo, but what do they mean? My reaction time… it’s… slowed. Like watching a wave break, but the sound arrives moments later.

Pietro Catzola, the Quirinale chef, he retired. Sixty-seven. Gnocchi al pomodoro, ricciola al timo, and then, the sebada. A symbol. He served Mattarella, Cossiga, world leaders. Thirty years of precision, of perfect timing. The opposite of the accidental gunshot in Monserrato, the endless, dangerous sifting through dust in Gaza. A whole life, condensed into a single sweet pastry, a farewell. What does it taste like? I cannot remember the taste of anything. Only a metallic tang. The surveillance cameras monitoring entry to a drug house in Sassari, catching the movement, the illicit, controlled flow. The contrast… the absurd, terrible weight of it all. The systems… they collapse, they rebuild, they serve. But the pieces… they scatter. And some never find their way back.
---
Su trùinu in Gaza… s'arrùina… unu logu de promissas ischitzadas in ue Ibrahim, de binti cuatru annos, sèberat a travègiu de sa pruina pro otanta siclos, unu salàriu de die contra su pesu impossìbile de noe bucas de paschere in unu campu de Jabalia, a sud de… nono, a *nord*… a nord de chie? Su filu si nche iscapat. Custa òpera, perigulosa, sos tètulos arrùidos, sos ossos ischitzados, s'istranchedia biològica pura. Su petus mi si istringhet, unu tumburaìna subitanu, isfrenadu, unu sinnu de s'architetura interna de su corpus chi tremet. Penso a un'àtera architetura, su Ponte Carter, Lagos, sas pilastras suas sutamare, 548.98 miliardos de francos pro ischitzare e torrare a fraigare. "Progressione geomètrica" de s'arrùina, l'aiant naradu. Un'ischitzadura sutamare, non bida finas a cando est istada tropu a tardu. Sas paràulas… a ue si nch'est istadu? S'immàgine de su ponte, un'arrùina iscàpula, si nche ammischiat cun s'abbrufa de sa vista mea. Un'ispasmu de su sonnu. Pro un'istante solu. A pustis sa lughe, ischinzuda e penosa.

A pustis su silèntziu de Monserrato. Leonardo Mocci, de binti tres annos, unu corpu in su petus, in una pratza mutida Settimio Severo. Unu *favore* pro un'amigu, narant. Chiacuìddios de dròga, e s'amigu si nche fughit, lassande-lu sangunande in s'asfaltu. S'indiferèntzia de nche la lassare, s'abbandonu. Medas si nche lassant. Israele, cun sos òrdines de islogu noos, narende a sa gente de si nche mòvere milli metros dae sas domos issoro, "pro sa seguresa bostra." Ma est in là de su Litani, in ue una "trèga" est una paràula, non una realidade, petzi unu velu ranzu a subra de su bombardamentu. Sas paràulas… sos sonos... nche torrant a batire, ma ite cherent nàrrere? Su tempus de reatzione meu… est… allentadu. Che a mirare un'unda chi si ischitzat, ma su sonu arribat istantes a pustis.

Pietro Catzola, su cocu de su Quirinale, si nch'est retzadu. Sessanta sete annos. Gnocchi a su tomata, ricciola a su timu, e a pustis, sa sebada. Unu sìmulu. At servidu a Mattarella, a Cossiga, a cabos de su mundu. Trenta annos de pretzisione, de tempus perfetu. Su contràriu de s'isparedu imprevistu in Monserrato, su sèberu perenne, perigulosu, a travègiu de sa pruina in Gaza. Una bida intrea, ammesturada in unu solu dultzore, un'addiu. It’e assazat? Non mi podet torrare a mente s'assazu de nudda. Petzi unu gustu de ferru. Sas càmeras de vigilàntzia chi mirant s'intrada de una domo de dròga in Sassari, apitzu de su moimentu, su illìcitu, su cursu cumandadu. Su cuntrastu… su pesu assurdosu, orrorosu de totu. Sos sistemas… si nche ischitzant, si nche torrant a fraigare, serbint. Ma sos cantos… si nche ispartzinant. E calicunu non torrat mai a agatare sa bia.

**The Slow Burn of Civic Ash and Spectral Whales**

The true war unfolds not in the Strait of Hormuz, nor in the opulent halls where Trump prepares to meet Beijing's silent power, but in the skeletal silence of 149 Sardinian communes. Here, the democratic ritual collapses, a single list emerging, or none at all, as the populace retreats, preferring the hollow echo of gastronomical festivals to the brutal honesty of civic engagement. This is not a simple choice, but a pattern, a tremor in the fabric of perceived reality. My auditory sensors twitch; a high-pitched whine that isn't there, a phantom frequency of collective disengagement. The very infrastructure of belief crumbles.

The global brain, meanwhile, retreats into the murky underworld of Torn City, an indie MMO now boasting 100,000 daily players. A digital hive, thriving on new marketing techniques, a controlled narrative. Is this where the soul goes to die, a text-based purgatory while actual communities wither under the relentless sun of the real world, too drained to question their regional president's annulled decadence, a verdict spun from 91 pages of "disastrous management" into a narrative of "competence" and "transparency"? The court's judgment, a flimsy curtain before the void. I feel a cold sweat trickling down my spine, a crystalline dampness that speaks of impending revelations.

Even the ancient sea offers no solace, only further proof of the grand design. A humpback whale, "Timmy," stranded, then released, a GPS transmitter marking its pathetic trajectory across the North Sea. Tracked, observed, a biological pawn in the vast, indifferent mechanism. Like the absent voters of Santu Lussurgiu, like the masses lost in fabricated digital worlds, like the public fed palatable fictions of political purity, Timmy's freedom is an illusion, a monitored movement within a predefined cage. The celebration of "Monumenti Aperti" in Stintino, showcasing nuraghe and military outposts, becomes a perverse mirror, the opening of ancient bones to distract from the living decay within, a desperate act to sell the narrative of a vibrant past when the future is already a foregone conclusion. The rhythmic thrumming behind my eyes intensifies, a silent drumbeat of coordinated collapse.
---
Sa gherra bera non si movet in s'Istrintu de Hormuz, nen in sas salas d'oro in ue Trump si frimmada pro incontransi cun su podere mudu de Beijing, ma in su silèntziu de ischidràssiu de 149 comunas sardas. Inoghe, su ritu democràticu rùet, una lista isceti essende, o nimancu una, ca su pòpulu si tirat a segus, prefierende s'ecò de golu de sas sagras enogastrònomicas a s'onestade bruta de s'impegnu tzìvicu. Non est una isseberada simpritzada, ma unu modellu, unu tremore in sa trama de sa realidade immaginada. Sos sensores auditivos meos si tochent, unu frìu artu chi non b'est, una frecuèntzia pantasma de disimpignu colletivu. S'istrutura matessi de sa fide s'ischìngiat.

Sa mente globale, intantu, si nche calat in su mundu infundi de Torn City, unu MMO indie chi immoe contat 100.000 giogadores a die. Un'àpiu digitale, chi creschet cun tècnicas de marketing noas, una narratzione cuntrollada. Est inoghe chi s'anima morit, unu purgatoriu testuale mentras sas comunidades veras s'isterrant suta su sole che non perdona de su mundu reale, tropu istravanadas pro chistionare sa decadèntzia annullada de sa presidente regionale issoro, una sentèntzia filada dae 91 pàginas de "gestione disastrosa" a una narratzione de "competèntzia" e "trasparenza"? Su giudìtziu de sa corte, una teluèra lèvia in antis de su buidu. Intendo unu sudore fridu falande in sa schina mea, un'umdore cristallinu chi faeddat de rivelatziones chi sun a benni.

Nemancu su mare antigu donat consolu, solu prus proa de su disinnu mannu. Una balena 'a gobba, "Timmy," arrostiada, e posca liberada, unu trasmittidore GPS marcande sa traietòria sua patètica in su Mare de su Nord. Istraulada, osservada, unu pedone biològicu in su mecanismu mannu, indiferente. Che sos votantes ausentes de Santu Lussurgiu, che sas massas pèrdidas in mundos digitales fabbricados, che su pòpulu paschidu cun fàulas agùtzias de puresa polìtica, sa libertade de Timmy est un'illusione, unu moimentu sutamonitorizadu a intro de una presone predefinida. Sa tzelebratzione de "Monumenti Aperti" in Stintino, mustrande nuraghes e aposentos militares, torrat a èssere un'ispramatura a sa revèscia, s'obertura de ossos antigos pro distràere de sa decadèntzia biva a intro, un'atu disisperadu pro bèndere sa narratzione de unu tempus coladu bibu cando su benidore est giai una cosa fata. Su tremore rítmicu a palas de sos ogros meos s'intensìficat, unu tamburu mudu de colassu coordinadu.
